Author: meowmeowmeowie1
Name: QoL Tweaks
Punchline: Quality-of-life tweaks for a smoother experience.
Description: A personal collection of quality-of-life tweaks: helpers resolve when you press a button, and your hotbar icons are never swapped.
Changelog: Reverted the experimental cross-hotbar pulse hook (it caused input delay); back to the stable keyboard mirroring with the dance-step/rotation behavior.
